context_lines: <cmd>Make a 25 mm (1 inch) continuous, vertical scratch using moderate pressure with a 3 mm (1/8 inch) conical 120 grit abrasive bit on the inside sidewall of the test container, midway between the heel, shoulder, and seams.</cmd>
<cmd>Do NOT rotate the container when making the scratch.</cmd>
suggestions.suggestion:
step 3 has an empty <cmd> element.
Each `<step>` must contain a non-empty `<cmd>` element describing the action the user should perform.
Example: `<step><cmd>Click the Save button.</cmd></step>`

suggestions.issue: <image> #1 (href='../media/image1.png') has no alt text — required for accessibility
context_lines: <cmd>Capture one commercial container that has passed inspection. This container will become the first test container.</cmd>

<cmd>Mark the test container on the finish to clearly identify. Use tape, marker or other means to ensure that it can easily be found on the line in the event that it is not broken in the squeeze tester.</cmd>
suggestions.suggestion:
<image> #1 (href='../media/image1.png') has no alt text — required for accessibility.
Add an `alt` attribute to the `<image>` element with a brief description of what the image shows.
Example: `<image href='../media/image.png' alt='Description of image content'/>`

suggestions.issue: <conbody> exists but has no child elements or text content
suggestions.suggestion:
exists but has no child elements or text content. The body element exists but has no content — this topic renders blank. Add at least one child element (`

`, `

`, `
    `, etc.) with meaningful content, or remove the topic if it is no longer needed.

suggestions.issue: <shortdesc> element is missing — required for search previews and navigation
suggestions.suggestion:
<shortdesc> element is missing — required for search previews and navigation.
Add a `<shortdesc>` element immediately after the `<title>` element. Write 1–2 sentences (max 30 words) summarising the topic purpose. Avoid generic openers like 'This topic describes...'.

suggestions.issue: <table> #1 has no <title> element — required for accessibility and DITA compliance
suggestions.suggestion:
<table> #1 has no <title> element — required for accessibility and DITA compliance.
Add a `<title>` element as the first child of the `<table>` element.
Example: `<table><title>Descriptive table title</title><tgroup ...>`

suggestions.issue: <prolog> element is missing — AI (Layer 3) should have added prolog with keywords and indexterms
suggestions.suggestion:
<prolog> element is missing — AI (Layer 3) should have added prolog with keywords and indexterms.
Add a `<prolog>` element after `<shortdesc>` (or after `<title>` if shortdesc is absent) containing metadata and keywords:
`<prolog><metadata><keywords><keyword>term</keyword></keywords></metadata></prolog>`
